activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gemma4-lms-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gemma4-lms-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A renewal risk review dashboard for B2B accounts, displaying queue status, selected account details, supporting evidence, an escalation policy summary, and clear decision controls leading to a handoff process.
parsed.html:
#queue-panel>

Renewal accounts

  • AC-903 (Northstar Labs - $84K ARR) [Champion change]
  • AC-904 (Bright Arc - $42K ARR) [Usage drop]
  • AC-905 (Harbor Grid - $120K ARR) [Procurement risk]

Renewal Risk Review

Status: Champion change

Plan: Enterprise annual
Renewal Value: $84K ARR

Evidence

  • Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
  • Primary champion left the account last month.
  • Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.

Escalation Rule

Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear; missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.

Choose renewal path

Actions

Renewal Handoff

Owner: Customer success manager. Reason: Champion changed and usage dropped, but procurement timing is missing.

raw_response:
{"summary":"A renewal risk review dashboard for B2B accounts, displaying queue status, selected account details, supporting evidence, an escalation policy summary, and clear decision controls leading to a handoff process.","css":"body{font-family:sans-serif;background:#f4f7f9;color:#333;margin:0;padding:20px;}main{display:flex;gap:20px;max-width:1400px;margin:auto;}#queue-panel{flex:0 0 250px;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);padding:15px;height:fit-content;}#detail-view{flex:1;display:grid;gap:20px;}header{background:#fff;padding:25px;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}h1{margin-top:0;font-size:1.75rem;color:#1a237e;}h2{border-bottom:2px solid #eee;padding-bottom:10px;margin-top:20px;color:#3949ab;}ul{list-style-type:none;padding:0;}li{padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px dotted #eee;}button{padding:10px 15px;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;transition:background .2s;}button.primary{background:#3949ab;color:#fff;width:100%;margin-bottom:10px;}button.secondary{background:#e8eaf6;color:#3949ab;}button.danger{background:#f44336;color:#fff;}@media(max-width:1024px){main{flex-direction:column;}#queue-panel{flex:auto;}#detail-view{grid-template-columns:1fr;}","html":"
